metadata.title: OpenCore Legacy Patcher Non-Metal GPU Caveats
metadata.description: Review non-Metal GPU planning caveats for older Macs before using OpenCore Legacy Patcher.

checker.title: Check non-Metal GPU risk before choosing a target macOS
checker.description: Older graphics hardware can be the biggest practical limit for an unsupported Mac upgrade.

faq.title: Non-Metal GPU FAQ
faq.description: What to verify before upgrading an older graphics setup.

items.question: What does non-Metal mean for OCLP planning?
items.answer: It means the GPU lacks Apple's Metal graphics API support, which can affect acceleration and patch requirements.

items.question: Can OCLP make every non-Metal Mac feel modern?
items.answer: No. Patches can help some systems, but hardware limits and performance tradeoffs remain.
